"for so it seemed good in thy sight" This is the equivalent of "so your will decreed it."
yet hast thou brought up my life from corruption = Brought me back to life.

and the language the Lord used with the Prophet Joseph Smith while he was imprisoned in Liberty Jail (see D&C 122:7) are similar, both even speaking of the "jaws of hell [gaping] open the mouth." Also compare Jonah 2:7 with the language in Alma 36:18. Jonah's vow to "pay that that I have vowed" was his way of saying he would fulfill the mission given him, and so "the Lord spake unto the fish, and…
